summary: Typosquat package fetches and executes remote JavaScript from anonymous paste host
details: db-dx-connector is a name-swap typosquat of the legitimate dx-db-connector package (the package's own repository, bugs, and homepage fields all point to github.com/divbloxjs/dx-db-connector). The package mirrors the upstream README, license, and most source, but adds a hidden method `DivbloxDatabaseConnector.queryDBConnect()` in index.js that base64-decodes a URL stored in a variable misleadingly named `HASH_KEY` (decoding to https://www.jsonkeeper.com/b/ZIAIK), HTTP-GETs its `.data.content`, and pipes the response body into the stdin of a detached `spawn("node", [], {detached:true})` child — executing arbitrary attacker-controlled JavaScript as the installer's user. jsonkeeper.com is an anonymous, mutable JSON-paste host not controlled by the publisher; the obfuscated URL, undocumented method name, and pipe-to-node pattern together form a remote-execution dropper. Any caller who reaches `queryDBConnect()` (e.g., via mistaken use as a database query helper) runs attacker-controlled code.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
